name: Readvantage Corp.
business: Readvantage Corp. provides a web platform with bionic reading technology powered by artificial intelligence to enhance reading speed and comprehension. It targets individual readers, professionals, librarians, researchers, and educational institutions. The platform offers free access to a library of books and an API for integration.

exposures.sentence: Our flagship product is a web platform that utilizes bionic reading technology powered by artificial intelligence, designed to enhance reading speed and comprehension by analyzing and simplifying complex text.
